---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat]: "
labels: [enhancement, triage]
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve, and for whom? Why now?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it touches a domain module, note which one
(auth, user, member, organization, workspace, mission, engine).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why you'd skip them.

## Scope / constraints

Anything that must not change (e.g. the domain layer staying framework-free),
migrations involved, or out-of-scope items.

## Additional context

Links, references, mockups.
